fields.label: Logical drives
fields.collector: Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_LogicalDisk -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object DeviceID, DriveType, FileSystem, VolumeName, Size, FreeSpace, Description

column.name: LogicalDrives
column.description: Logical drives/volumes as a JSON array (drive letter, type, file system, label, size, free space) from Win32_LogicalDisk.
